calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-05-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Perker L. Meeks, Jr., Clerk Sadie Li, Reporter Maura Baldocchi #5207. Dpt 303, Nathalie Kakone petitioner present, sworn and examined, Court grants decreed changing name to Nathalie Blavin-Kakone. Order signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Reset To Aug-05-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; CRS: Beldon Yee, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner, Nathalie Kakone present in pro per.
No proof of service filed, the hearing is continued to: August 4, 2003.
